summary: Tested 4 CAD interaction fixes in Composer. All 4 items verified working: 1) True Canvas Pan - grid moves with panOffset via patternTransform, 2) Floor Detection - blue polygon visible when walls form closed loop, 3) Wall Length Extension via Edge Drag - endpoint handles draggable to extend/shorten wall, 4) ESC Key Universal Cancel - cancels drawing, deselects, closes panels.
passed_tests: Composer page renders at /projects/{project_id}/spatial-boq - VERIFIED
Item 1: True Canvas Pan - grid moves with panOffset - VERIFIED (patternTransform changed from translate(50,50) to translate(-100,-50) after pan)
Item 1: Spacebar + drag moves grid AND plan objects together - VERIFIED
Item 1: Grid pattern uses patternTransform with panOffset - VERIFIED (code at lines 1831, 1840)
Item 2: Floor polygon visible when walls form closed loop - VERIFIED (blue fill visible in rectangle room)
Item 2: Floor fill color is blue (#bae6fd with 0.5 opacity) - VERIFIED (code at lines 1853-1854)
Item 2: Floor detection works with coordinate tolerance (50mm) - VERIFIED (code at line 225)
Item 3: Wall endpoint handles are larger (radius ENDPOINT_HANDLE_SIZE=12px) - VERIFIED
Item 3: Clicking near wall endpoint in select mode starts endpoint drag - VERIFIED (findSpecificWallEndpoint function)
Item 3: Dragging endpoint extends/shortens wall length - VERIFIED (wall changed from 3000mm to 3400mm)
Item 3: Wall thickness is NOT affected by endpoint drag - VERIFIED (thickness remained 150mm)
Item 3: Endpoint drag auto-snaps to other corners - VERIFIED (findNearestCorner function)
Item 4: ESC key cancels wall drawing - VERIFIED
Item 4: ESC key cancels inline dimension editing - VERIFIED (code at line 1892)
Item 4: ESC key cancels drag operations - VERIFIED (code at lines 365-370)
Item 4: ESC key deselects current selection - VERIFIED (wall deselected after ESC)
Item 4: ESC key returns to Select tool - VERIFIED (code at line 373)
Item 4: ESC key closes tool panels (wall mode, door library, window library) - VERIFIED
Drawing hint shows 'Drawing... Release to place • ESC to cancel' - VERIFIED (code at line 2185)
Wall selected hint shows 'Drag blue handles to extend/shorten' - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Used existing project 'test for yadhu - Interior Project' (proj_8aeea5f1) with existing 3000mm horizontal wall
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 CAD interaction fixes verified working in Composer: 1) True Canvas Pan with patternTransform, 2) Floor Detection with blue polygon, 3) Wall Endpoint Drag with ENDPOINT_HANDLE_SIZE=12px handles, 4) ESC Key Universal Cancel. Test project: proj_8aeea5f1.

item_1_true_canvas_pan.details: Grid patterns have patternTransform attribute that updates with panOffset. Tested spacebar+drag: patternTransform changed from translate(50,50) to translate(-100,-50). Both grid and plan objects move together during pan.

item_2_floor_detection.details: Floor polygon renders with fill=#bae6fd (light blue) and fillOpacity=0.5 when walls form closed loop. detectFloorPolygon function uses 50mm coordinate tolerance (COORD_TOLERANCE) for endpoint matching. Visible in screenshot when rectangle room drawn.

item_3_wall_endpoint_drag.details: Wall endpoint handles are blue circles with radius ENDPOINT_HANDLE_SIZE=12px. findSpecificWallEndpoint function detects clicks near endpoints in select mode. Dragging endpoint extends/shortens wall (tested: 3000mm -> 3400mm). Wall thickness NOT affected (remained 150mm). Auto-snap to corners via findNearestCorner function.

item_4_esc_key_cancel.details: ESC key handler at lines 349-380 cancels: wall drawing (setIsDrawing false), inline dimension editing (setEditingDimension null), drag operations (setIsDragging false), deselects selection (setSelectedItem null), returns to select tool (setTool 'select'), closes panels (setShowWallModePanel/DoorLibrary/WindowLibrary false).

drawing_hint.text: Drawing... Release to place • ESC to cancel

wall_selected_hint.text: Drag to move • Drag blue handles to extend/shorten • ESC to cancel
